news.t: Structural Shift or Recency Bias? Decoding Value's Mixed Signals in 2026
ALLSPRING LAUNCHES ACTIVELY MANAGED EQUITY ETFs

holdings.infoBox: ASLV is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 5.35%, Alphabet at 4.90%, Canadian Pacific Kansas City at 3.97%, NextEra Energy at 3.87%, and Qnity Electronics at 3.63%.

overview.description: The Allspring Special Large Value ETF (ASLV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of 30 to 50 large-cap value US companies. The fund utilizes a fundamental approach to investing. ASLV was launched on Mar 26, 2025 and is issued by Allspring.

data.title: Structural Shift or Recency Bias? Decoding Value's Mixed Signals in 2026
data.text: Value investors may be facing a conviction crisis. Despite leading in performance so far in 2026, value ETFs have struggled to consistently gather assets, with some funds picking up significant net ne...
